title: Llama Guard and Safety Classifiers
concept: Using lightweight safety models to classify and block toxic or unsafe instructions in the loop.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of setting token limits in AI systems?
exercises.explain: Setting token limits helps control costs by preventing runaway billing, ensuring that AI runs efficiently within budget.

cards.title: Introducing Llama Guard
cards.body: Llama Guard is a lightweight safety model that helps AI filter out harmful or unsafe instructions.

cards.title: Safety Classifiers
cards.body: Safety classifiers are tools that can identify and block toxic instructions, ensuring safer AI interactions.

cards.title: A Bouncer for AI
cards.body: Think of Llama Guard as a bouncer at a club: it checks if guests (instructions) are appropriate before they get in!

cards.title: Classifying Instructions
cards.body: If someone asks the AI to perform a harmful action, Llama Guard steps in and blocks that request.

cards.title: Myth: AI Can Handle Everything
cards.body: Some believe AI should handle any instruction, but without filters, it can cause real harm!

cards.title: Compare Guardrails & Filters
cards.body: Guardrails keep AI on the right path while filters block harmful instructions.

exercises.prompt: What is the role of lightweight safety models like Llama Guard?

options.text: To annoy users by blocking good requests
To classify and block toxic instructions
To increase the cost of AI runs

exercises.explain: Lightweight safety models like Llama Guard exist to ensure user safety by identifying and blocking harmful or toxic inputs.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Llama Guard helps improve AI responses by allowing any type of instruction.
exercises.explain: False—Llama Guard blocks harmful instructions to keep interactions safe.

exercises.prompt: Llama Guard is a lightweight safety model that helps classify and block ______ instructions.
exercises.sentence: Llama Guard is a lightweight safety model that helps classify and block toxic instructions.
exercises.explain: The correct term is 'toxic instructions' because that’s the focus of the safety model's job.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following best describes the function of Llama Guard?
exercises.explain: Llama Guard specifically focuses on blocking harmful instructions to ensure safe AI interactions.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of using a lightweight safety model like Llama Guard in AI systems?

options.text: To classify and prevent toxic instructions.
To expand AI's capability without limits.
To allow any input without restrictions.

exercises.explain: The correct answer is to classify and prevent toxic instructions. Llama Guard ensures that harmful inputs are blocked, promoting safety in AI usage, which is essential as we use AI in more helpful and responsible manners.
